name: Marketing Budget Planner
description: Marketing Budget Planner - Marketing template for strategy professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template Step 1: Set Your Annual Budget Go to the Budget Planner tab and enter your total annual marketing budget in the yellow cell at the top. Everything flows from this number. Step 2: Allocate by Category Enter your planned monthly spend for each category. The template covers 12 categories — from digital advertising to events to tools. Adjust categories to match your reality. Step 3: Track Actuals Monthly At the end of each month, enter your actual spend.
